info.name: GraphQL – Email Module
info.description: Email: findEmails, findEmailsBulk, verifySingleEmail, verifyEmailsBulk (queries); addEmailPattern, addEmailPatternBulk (mutations). Job creation delegates to Jobs module. Variables: use camelCase (firstName, lastName, domain, companyUuid). See sql/apis/15_EMAIL_MODULE.md (Queries and mutations – parameters and variable types).

body.raw: {"query":"query FindEmails($input: EmailFinderInput!) { email { findEmails(input: $input) { emails { uuid email source } total success } } }","variables":{"input":{"firstName":"John","lastName":"Doe","domain":"example.com"}}

body: query":"query VerifySingleEmail($input: SingleEmailVerifierInput!) { email { verifySingleEmail(input: $input) { result { email status } success } } }","variables":{"input":{"email":"john@example.com"}}

query":"mutation AddEmailPattern($input: EmailPatternAddInput!) { email { addEmailPattern(input: $input) { uuid companyUuid domain } } }","variables":{"input":{"companyUuid":"","email":"j@example.com","firstName":"John","lastName":"Doe","domain":"example.com"}}
